themes.exampleQuote: One of the widest tea selections I have ever seen
a wonderful pseudo-third space where you can sip tea, relax, play a board game, study, and talk to other patrons
Staff is extremely friendly and knowledgeable about tea
It's hard to get a seat sometimes because it's crowded
The babaganoush is delicious and do try their snack platters, I love the sesame cookie

notable_quote: One of my favorite places on Earth: a wonderfully large selection of teas from around the world, served in an intimate and quiet setting.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers return again and again for the depth of the tea menu, the unhurried atmosphere, and staff who can actually explain what they're serving; the only friction is seating, when the room fills up, finding a spot becomes a real obstacle.
quarter_narrative: Ten Pittsburgh creators filed TikToks at Dobrá Tea this quarter, logging nearly 10,000 plays across 11 videos, and the business posted once to Instagram in the same window. The gap is not catastrophic, the review signal is among the strongest in the Pittsburgh Cafes family, 1,107 reviews at 82 percent five-star, but while the city's Cafes leader, Allegheny Coffee and Tea Exchange, is building rank on social momentum, Dobrá's own feed has gone nearly dormant. Holding the top spot in the tea house family at #6 in Cafes overall is a defensible position right now; what decides whether that holds next issue is whether the Instagram signal wakes up before a competitor absorbs the creator attention Dobrá is currently collecting by reputation alone.
tldr_read: Review sentiment near the top of the family, Instagram nearly silent for a month, Ones to Watch and #1 in Pittsburgh Tea Houses.
tldr_meaning: The review foundation is strong enough to sustain the current rank, but the Instagram momentum gap is the single axis keeping Dobrá out of Icons territory.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: Ranked First In Tea Houses On The Strength Of Reviews. The Instagram Signal Has Gone Quiet.

playbook.headline: Restart Instagram before the gap widens
playbook.action: One post every five days is enough to recover momentum; the account has been silent for 19 days with zero reels this month

playbook.headline: Convert TikTok creators into tagged content
playbook.action: Ten unique creators posted this quarter with no business TikTok to redirect to; a handle and a single pinned response reshapes that loop

playbook.headline: Surface the food menu visually
playbook.action: Baba ganoush, sesame cookies, and snack platters appear in reviews but are underrepresented across 690 Google photos; one dedicated food shoot fills that gap
